text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... To think I would encounter this femme
fatale on the day of my genesis! Fate is truly an
unstoppable force!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ramonu
text_block_list.text:
You're as vocal as ever. Are you that eager to
receive well wishes and flowers from me?

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
Hah, surely you mean a blue delphinium-filled
bouquet. But I ask not for such mercy nor
blessings!

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
The opposite is true! Today, I shall be the one
celebrating! Once again, the stars have
completed their waltz, marking another year since
my descent from Chaos and the birth of a new
Gaia!

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
And Ramonu... Today, I shall be the one to
congratulate you, for you have had the fortune of
crossing paths with me. Allow me to fill your cup
personally.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ramonu
text_block_list.text:
Such a grandiose invitation. Might I request a
glass of amrita?

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
What need do you have for Aion when you are
already counted among the stars? No, what I
have is far more invigorating—it will burn your
very psyche!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ramonu
text_block_list.text:
Then let's have a taste, shall we? I'll accept your
toast to the world... and the passion within it.

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
Haha! That's the spirit, my lady! Now, take my
hand! And let us begin this celebration of me, by
none other than me!
